description: Surgical debridement of soft tissue, right thigh and hip
rationale: Explicitly listed under 'PROCEDURES PERFORMED' as 'massive debridement of soft tissue, right lateral thigh and hip' on 03/05/08. This is the base code for debridement of subcutaneous tissue.
official_description: CPT code 11042 is for the debridement of subcutaneous tissue for wounds up to 20 square centimeters or less.

description: Surgical debridement of soft tissue, right thigh and hip
rationale: Explicitly listed under 'PROCEDURES PERFORMED' as 'Soft tissue debridement on 03/16/08 of right thigh and hip'. The narrative confirms this was a 'further resection' in the OR.
official_description: CPT code 11042 is for the debridement of subcutaneous tissue for wounds up to 20 square centimeters or less.

description: Split-thickness skin graft to right thigh and hip
rationale: Explicitly listed under 'PROCEDURES PERFORMED' as 'Split thickness skin graft to right thigh and right hip massive open wound on 04/01/08'. This is the base code for this procedure.
official_description: CPT code 15100 is a medical code used to describe a skin split graft procedure on the trunk, arm, or leg.

rationale: The hospital course narrative explicitly states, 'He is treated with a wound VAC.' Given the 'massive' wound size, the code for a surface area greater than 50 sq cm is appropriate.
